title: 🔥指标触及定投黄金坑
body: 市场深陷低估区域。AHR999(3D)报0.48处于定投区，当前价格$78,483低于200日定投成本$83,535，偏离-6.0%。这意味着市场平均持币成本被击穿，浮筹已大幅出清。低于长期成本的定价通常对应极高的安全边际与盈亏比。偏多。左侧机会确认了吗？
body_en: Market is deep in undervalued territory. AHR999 (3D) is at 0.48, sitting right in the accumulation zone. Current price of $78,483 is below the 200-day DCA cost of $83,535, a -6.0% deviation. This means the average market cost basis has been broken through, and weak hands have been largely flushed out. Pricing below long-term cost typically correlates with massive safety margins and risk-reward ratios. Bullish. Is the left-side play confirmed?
